about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: The mind behind the visuals
about.bio:
I'm Youssef Sayed, a multidisciplinary designer and visual storyteller based in the creative world. I specialize in Graphic Design, Video Editing, UI/UX Design, and Motion Graphics. My work is driven by a passion for crafting compelling visual narratives that connect with audiences on an emotional level.

With years of experience across multiple creative disciplines, I bring a unique perspective to every project. Whether it's designing a brand identity, editing a cinematic video, crafting intuitive user interfaces, or creating mesmerizing motion graphics — I approach each challenge with curiosity, precision, and a commitment to excellence.
